ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCCONFERENCE):
Atty. LAURA LOECK, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming, LLP (Tel: 619-544-6838) for defendant City Storage Systems, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY STORAGE SYSTEMS LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City Storage Systems LLC's demurrer to the complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed.

Counsel for defendant to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCCONFERENCE):
Atty. LAURA LOECK, Esq. of Murchison & Cumming, LLP (Tel: 619-544-6838) for defendant City Storage Systems, LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CITY STORAGE SYSTEMS LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City Storage Systems LLC's motion to strike Plaintiff's claims for punitive damages is granted. No opposition filed.

Counsel for defendant to prepar and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
